sources.excerpt: Caruso’s Grocery official homepage identifies the Washington, DC location and links to the carryout ordering page.
Toast ordering page identifies 914 14th ST SE, Washington, DC and lists the Capitol Hill dinner and NA BEV menu.
Official PDF menu is headed 1401 PENN AVE SE, WASH DC 20003 and lists Capitol Hill menu presentations.
Official FAQ states the restaurant does its best to accommodate allergies.
Targeted search for Caruso’s Grocery allergen, allergy, nutrition, ingredients, and PDF material returned no official allergen matrix.

attempts.outcome: direct item descriptions found; no matrix document
